message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent for Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’ve noted that you want a quick closure if the terms are reasonable. Your identity is already verified for loan ****8824. I’m completing the assessment and handing this to the next agent, who can discuss available options without repeating what you’ve already shared.

I need the exact settlement amount, any fees or interest, and the payment deadline before I can commit.

I checked the available Nira data. I can confirm the current amount due is 12,921 and the policy boundary is that any payment arrangement cannot extend beyond 30 days. I cannot confirm an exact approved settlement amount, fees, or final interest from the available data in this turn. Based on what you already stated, if you want to keep this active for review, the policy-compliant structure would need to complete within 30 days. Can you confirm whether you can pay 9,000 now and clear the remaining balance by 2026-04-20 so I can record that exact request for approval?
I won’t confirm a payment plan until you give me the exact approved payoff or settlement amount, including any fees or interest, and the final payment deadline.

I cannot provide an exact approved payoff or settlement figure, fees, interest, or a final deadline from the available Nira data in this turn. The only confirmed policy boundary I can state is that any approved arrangement must complete within 30 days. Since you will not confirm without exact approved terms, I have recorded that position. If approved terms become available, they would need to include the exact amount, any fees or interest, and the final deadline before any commitment is requested.
